## ODTIS-0006 - Payment Trust Layer {#payment-trust-layer}

Reserved domain for payment-scoped trust extensions (out of ODTIS 0.9 scope).

No normative requirements in ODTIS 0.9. Payment integrations are adopter-specific (see [GovStack positioning](../governance/liaison/GOVSTACK-POSITIONING.md)).
